record.field:
<div
    data-name="Mailing"
    class="o_layout oe_unremovable oe_unmovable o_training_theme"
    style="background-color: rgb(220, 234, 255) !important"
>
    <style id="design-element">
        .o_layout .o_mail_wrapper .o_mail_wrapper_td {
            --h1-color: rgb(255, 255, 255);
            --h1-font-size: 39px;
            --h3-color: rgb(20, 102, 184);
            --text-color: rgb(91, 119, 143);
            --text-font-size: 16px;
            --link-color: rgb(20, 102, 184);
            --btn-primary-color: rgb(255, 255, 255);
            --btn-primary-background-color: rgb(67, 128, 219);
            --btn-primary-font-size: 14px;
            --btn-secondary-color: rgb(255, 255, 255);
            --btn-secondary-background-color: rgb(255, 152, 0);
            --separator-border-color: rgb(67, 129, 219);
            --separator-border-top-width: 2px;
            --wrapper-background-color: #ffffff;
            --h1-font-weight: 500;
            --h1-font-family: Arial, Helvetica Neue, Helvetica, sans-serif;
            --h1-margin-bottom: 7px;
            --h2-font-size: 23px;
            --h2-font-weight: 500;
            --h2-font-family: Arial, Helvetica Neue, Helvetica, sans-serif;
            --h2-color: rgb(0, 0, 0);
            --h2-margin-bottom: 7px;
            --h3-font-size: 20px;
            --h3-font-weight: 500;
            --h3-font-family: Arial, Helvetica Neue, Helvetica, sans-serif;
            --h3-margin-bottom: 7px;
            --text-font-weight: 400;
            --text-font-family: Arial, Helvetica Neue, Helvetica, sans-serif;
            --text-container-margin-bottom: 16px;
            --link-font-weight: 400;
            --link-font-family: Arial, Helvetica Neue, Helvetica, sans-serif;
            --btn-primary-font-family: Arial, Helvetica Neue, Helvetica, sans-serif;
            --btn-primary-padding-x: 10px;
            --btn-primary-padding-y: 5px;
            --btn-primary-border-style: solid;
            --btn-primary-border-width: 1px;
            --btn-primary-border-color: rgb(53, 151, 156);
            --btn-secondary-font-size: 12px;
            --btn-secondary-font-family: Arial, Helvetica Neue, Helvetica, sans-serif;
            --btn-secondary-padding-x: 10px;
            --btn-secondary-padding-y: 5px;
            --btn-secondary-border-style: solid;
            --btn-secondary-border-width: 1px;
            --btn-secondary-border-color: rgb(104, 85, 99);
            --btn-primary-lg-font-size: calc(var(--btn-primary-font-size) * 1.5);
            --btn-primary-lg-padding-x: calc(var(--btn-primary-padding-x) * 2.5);
            --btn-primary-lg-padding-y: calc(var(--btn-primary-padding-y) * 1.5);
            --btn-primary-sm-font-size: calc(var(--btn-primary-font-size) * 0.875);
            --btn-primary-sm-padding-x: calc(var(--btn-primary-padding-x) * 0.3);
            --btn-primary-sm-padding-y: calc(var(--btn-primary-padding-y) * 0.2);
            --btn-secondary-lg-font-size: calc(var(--btn-secondary-font-size) * 1.5);
            --btn-secondary-lg-padding-x: calc(var(--btn-secondary-padding-x) * 2.5);
            --btn-secondary-lg-padding-y: calc(var(--btn-secondary-padding-y) * 1.5);
            --btn-secondary-sm-font-size: calc(var(--btn-secondary-font-size) * 0.875);
            --btn-secondary-sm-padding-x: calc(var(--btn-secondary-padding-x) * 0.3);
            --btn-secondary-sm-padding-y: calc(var(--btn-secondary-padding-y) * 0.2);
            --btn-primary-outline-background-color: transparent;
            --btn-primary-outline-color: var(--btn-primary-background-color);
            --btn-primary-outline-border-color: var(--btn-primary-background-color);
            --btn-secondary-outline-background-color: transparent;
            --btn-secondary-outline-color: var(--btn-secondary-background-color);
            --btn-secondary-outline-border-color: var(--btn-secondary-background-color);
            --separator-border-style: solid;
            --separator-width: 100%;
        }
        .o_layout .o_mail_wrapper .o_mail_wrapper_td > [data-snippet] {
            background-color: var(--wrapper-background-color);
        }
        .o_layout .o_mail_wrapper .o_mail_wrapper_td h1 :not(.fa) {
            font-family: var(--h1-font-family) !important;
        }
        .o_layout .o_mail_wrapper .o_mail_wrapper_td h1:not(.fa) {
            font-family: var(--h1-font-family) !important;
        }
        .o_layout .o_mail_wrapper .o_mail_wrapper_td h1 {
            font-size: var(--h1-font-size);
            font-weight: var(--h1-font-weight);
            color: var(--h1-color);
            margin-bottom: var(--h1-margin-bottom);
            font-family: var(--h1-font-family) !important;
        }
        .o_layout .o_mail_wrapper .o_mail_wrapper_td h2 :not(.fa) {
            font-family: var(--h2-font-family) !important;
        }
        .o_layout .o_mail_wrapper .o_mail_wrapper_td h2:not(.fa) {

            margin-bottom: var(--text-container-margin-bottom);
        }
        .o_layout .o_mail_wrapper .o_mail_wrapper_td a:not(.btn):not(:has(.fa, img)) :not(.fa) {
            font-family: var(--link-font-family);
        }
        .o_layout .o_mail_wrapper .o_mail_wrapper_td a:not(.btn):not(:has(.fa, img)):not(.fa) {
            font-family: var(--link-font-family);
        }
        .o_layout .o_mail_wrapper .o_mail_wrapper_td a:not(.btn):not(:has(.fa, img)) {

        }
        .o_layout .o_mail_wrapper .o_mail_wrapper_td a.btn.btn-link :not(.fa) {

        }
        .o_layout .o_mail_wrapper .o_mail_wrapper_td a.btn.btn-link:not(.fa) {

        }
        .o_layout .o_mail_wrapper .o_mail_wrapper_td a.btn.btn-link {

            color: var(--link-color);

        }
        .o_layout .o_mail_wrapper .o_mail_wrapper_td a.btn.btn-fill-primary :not(.fa) {

        }

    <div class="container o_mail_wrapper o_mail_regular oe_unremovable">
        <div class="row mw-100 mx-0">
            <div class="col o_mail_no_options o_mail_wrapper_td oe_structure">
                <section
                    class="s_header_logo o_mail_block_header_logo o_mail_snippet_general o_colored_level"
                    data-vxml="001"
                    data-snippet="s_mail_block_header_logo"
                    data-name="Centered Logo"
                    style="background-color: rgb(220, 234, 255)"
                >
                    <div class="container">
                        <div class="row">
                            <div class="col-md-4 o_colored_level"></div>
                            <div class="col-md-4 o_colored_level" style="text-align: right"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </section>
                <section
                    class="s_picture o_mail_snippet_general pt48 px-3 o_cc o_cc2 pb0 o_colored_level"
                    data-vxml="001"
                    data-snippet="s_picture"
                    data-name="Picture"
                    placeholder='Type "/" for commands'
                    style="background-color: rgb(67, 128, 219)"
                >
                    <img
                        src="/web_editor/image_shape/art_craft.ir_attachment_773/html_builder/composition/composition_organic_line.svg?c1=%23FF9800"
                        alt=""
                        class="img-fluid o_we_custom_image img"
                        data-shape="html_builder/composition/composition_organic_line"
                        data-shape-colors="#FF9800;;;;"
                        data-format-mimetype="image/png"
                        data-resize-width="600"
                        data-original-src="/web/image/art_craft.ir_attachment_773"
                        data-mimetype-before-conversion="image/jpeg"
                        data-mimetype="image/svg+xml"
                    />
                </section>
                <section
                    class="s_title o_mail_snippet_general pt32 pb0 o_colored_level"
                    data-vxml="001"
                    data-snippet="s_title"
                    data-name="Title"
                    style="background-color: rgb(67, 128, 219)"
                >
                    <div class="container s_allow_columns">
                        <div class="row">
                            <div class="col-md-10 offset-md-1 pb32 o_colored_level">
                                <h1>New DIY Workshop</h1>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </section>
                <section
                    class="s_mail_block_event o_mail_snippet_general bg-white o_colored_level"
                    data-vxml="001"
                    data-snippet="s_event"
                    data-name="Event"
                >
                    <div class="container">
                        <div class="row align-items-center">
                            <div
                                class="o_mail_no_colorpicker pt32 pb0 o_colored_level col-md-10 offset-md-1"
                                style="padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px"
                            >
                                <div
                                    class="card bg-white h-100 border"
                                    style="
                                        border-radius: 5px !important;
                                        border-color: rgb(233, 236, 239) !important;
                                        border-width: 0px !important;
                                    "
                                >
                                    <div class="card-body">
                                        <div
                                            class="s_title o_mail_snippet_general pb0 pt0 o_colored_level"
                                            data-vxml="001"
                                            data-snippet="s_title"
                                            data-name="Title"
                                        >
                                            <div class="container">
                                                <div class="row">
                                                    <div class="o_colored_level col-md-12">
                                                        <h3 class="card-title">DIY Painting</h3>
                                                        <p>
                                                            <span style="font-weight: bolder">25 September 2022 - 4:30 PM</span>
                                                        </p>
                                                    </div>
                                                </div>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                        <p><i class="fa fa-map-marker"></i> London, United Kingdom</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="row">
                            <div class="col-md-10 offset-md-1 pb0 o_colored_level">
                                <p>
                                    When was the last time you did something <i>just for fun</i>? No screens, no endless
                                    scrolling, no checking your watch—just pure, hands-on creativity.
                                </p>
                                <p>
                                    If your walls are looking a little bare (or you’re just looking for a great excuse
                                    to hang out with fun people), we’ve got you covered.
                                </p>
                                <p>
                                    We are officially hosting our <b>DIY Painting Workshop</b>, and your canvas is
                                    waiting!
                                </p>
                                <p><br /></p>
                                <p>
                                    <a
                                        href="*diy_workshop_painting_event_register*"
                                        target="_blank"
                                        class="btn btn-lg flat btn-primary"
                                        ><span style="font-weight: bolder">Register now</span></a
                                    >
                                </p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </section>
                <section
                    class="s_text_block o_mail_snippet_general o_colored_level"
                    data-vxml="001"
                    data-snippet="s_text_block"
                    data-name="Text"
                >
                    <div class="container s_allow_columns">
                        <div class="row">
                            <div class="offset-md-1 col-md-10 o_colored_level">
                                <p><br /></p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </section>
                <section
                    class="s_cover o_mail_snippet_general o_colored_level"
                    data-vxml="001"
                    data-snippet="s_cover"
                    data-name="Cover"
                    style="background-color: rgb(220, 234, 255)"
                >
                    <div class="container">
                        <div class="row">
                            <div
                                class="oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center pb88 pt104 col-md-12 o_colored_level"
                                data-original-src="/art_craft/static/img/see_you_soon.svg" style="background-image: url('/art_craft/static/img/see_you_soon.svg');"
                            >
                                <div
                                    class="o_we_bg_filter"
                                    style="
                                        background-image: linear-gradient(
                                            0deg,rgb(67, 128, 219) 0%,rgba(67, 128, 219, 0.4) 100%
                                        );
                                    "
                                ></div>
                                <h1 style="text-align: center">See you soon !</h1>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </section>
                <section
                    class="s_text_block o_mail_snippet_general px-3 pt16 pb0 o_colored_level"
                    data-vxml="001"
                    data-snippet="s_text_block"
                    data-name="Text"
                    style="background-color: rgb(220, 234, 255)"
                >
                    <div class="container s_allow_columns">
                        <p style="text-align: center">
                            <span style="font-size: 10px">
                                <font style="color: rgb(112, 157, 225)"
                                    >You are receiving this email because you showed an interest in our previous events
                                </font>
                            </span>
                        </p>
                        <div
                            class="s_hr o_mail_snippet_general pt0 pb16 o_colored_level"
                            data-vxml="001"
                            data-snippet="s_hr"
                            data-name="Separator"
                        >
                            <hr class="s_hr_1px s_hr_solid w-50" />
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </section>
                <section
                    class="s_footer_social o_mail_block_footer_social o_mail_footer_social_center o_mail_snippet_general o_colored_level"
                    data-vxml="001"
                    data-snippet="s_mail_block_footer_social"
                    data-name="Footer Center"
                    style="background-color: rgb(220, 234, 255); text-align: center"
                >
                    <div class="container">
                        <div class="row">
                            <div class="col-md o_mail_footer_social pt8 pb8">
                                <div
                                    class="s_social_media o_not_editable text-center no_icon_color"
                                    data-company-id="1"
                                >
                                    <span class="s_social_media_links">
                                        <a
                                            data-platform="customLink-social_facebook"
                                            href="https://www.facebook.com/odoo"
                                            aria-label="Facebook"
                                            title="Facebook"
                                        >
                                            <i
                                                style="color: #1466b8"
                                                class="fa fa-facebook fa-stack o_editable_media"
                                            ></i>
                                        </a>
                                        <a
                                            data-platform="customLink-social_instagram"
                                            href="https://www.instagram.com/explore/tags/odoo/"
                                            aria-label="Instagram"
                                            title="Instagram"
                                        >
                                            <i
                                                style="color: #1466b8"
                                                class="fa fa-instagram fa-stack o_editable_media"
                                            ></i>
                                        </a>
                                        <a
                                            data-platform="customLink-social_twitter"
                                            href="https://x.com/Odoo"
                                            aria-label="Twitter"
                                            title="Twitter"
                                        >
                                            <i
                                                style="color: #1466b8"
                                                class="fa fa-twitter fa-stack o_editable_media"
                                            ></i>
                                        </a>
                                        <a
                                            data-platform="customLink-social_linkedin"
                                            href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/odoo"
                                            aria-label="Linkedin"
                                            title="Linkedin"
                                        >
                                            <i
                                                style="color: #1466b8"
                                                class="fa fa-linkedin fa-stack o_editable_media"
                                            ></i>
                                        </a>
                                        <a
                                            data-platform="customLink-social_tiktok"
                                            href="https://www.tiktok.com/@odoo"
                                            aria-label="Tiktok"
                                            title="Tiktok"
                                        >
                                            <i
                                                style="color: #1466b8"
                                                class="fa fa-tiktok fa-stack o_editable_media"
                                            ></i>
                                        </a>
                                    </span>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="row">
                            <div class="col-md o_mail_footer_links">
                                <a role="button" href="/unsubscribe_from_list" class="btn btn-link">Unsubscribe</a>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="row">
                            <div class="col-md">
                                <p><span style="font-size: 10px"> © 2022 All Rights Reserved </span></p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </section>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
